activities_projects.title: Public Facilities Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Identify common public facilities in the community
steps: List five public facilities in your area (water supply, hospital, school, road, park)
Write who provides these facilities
Discuss why they are important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises public facilities in daily life

activities_projects.title: Importance of Water Supply
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of safe drinking water
steps: Write why clean water is important
List two problems people face without water supply
Explain how the government helps provide water
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of water as a public facility

activities_projects.title: Meaning of Public Facilities
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of public facilities
steps: Write the meaning of public facilities
Give two examples
Explain why they should be available to everyone
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of public facilities

activities_projects.title: Facilities Provided by Government
activities_projects.objective: Learn about services provided by the government
steps: Write three public services provided by the government
Explain how each service helps people
Share your answers in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of government in providing services

activities_projects.title: Public vs Private Services
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between public and private services
steps: Write one example of a public service
Write one example of a private service
Explain the difference between them

activities_projects.title: Short Story on Public Facilities
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of facilities in people's lives
steps: Write a short story about a village getting a new water supply
Explain how it helped people
Write the positive changes that happened
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of public services

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Chapter
activities_projects.objective: Learn important terms related to public facilities
steps: Write words like facility, government, service, water supply
Write simple meanings
Use one word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Public Facilities Poster
steps: Draw a poster showing important public facilities
Add labels like school, hospital, water supply
Explain the message of the poster

activities_projects.title: Facilities in Your School
steps: List three facilities available in your school
Explain why they are important
Suggest one improvement
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects civic ideas with school environment

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion on Public Services
steps: Discuss why public facilities are important
Write two points from the discussion
Write a short summary
